items.title: Databricks says annualized revenue rose 80%+ YoY to $6.9B, up from $5.4B in Q4; CEO Ali Ghodsi says higher AI agent usage is increasing costs, lowering margins (Jordan Novet/CNBC)
items.title_original: Databricks says annualized revenue rose 80%+ YoY to $6.9B, up from $5.4B in Q4; CEO Ali Ghodsi says higher AI agent usage is increasing costs, lowering margins (Jordan Novet/CNBC)
items.title_en: Databricks says annualized revenue rose 80%+ YoY to $6.9B, up from $5.4B in Q4; CEO Ali Ghodsi says higher AI agent usage is increasing costs, lowering margins (Jordan Novet/CNBC)
items.title_zh: Databricks 表示，年化收入同比增长 80% 以上，达到 $6.9B，高于第四季度的 $5.4B；首席执行官 Ali Ghodsi 表示，人工智能代理的使用量增加会增加成本、降低利润（Jordan Novet/CNBC）
items.title_bilingual: Databricks 表示，年化收入同比增长 80% 以上，达到 $6.9B，高于第四季度的 $5.4B；首席执行官 Ali Ghodsi 表示，人工智能代理的使用量增加会增加成本、降低利润（Jordan Novet/CNBC） / Databricks says annualized revenue rose 80%+ YoY to $6.9B, up from $5.4B in Q4; CEO Ali Ghodsi says higher AI agent usage is increasing costs, lowering margins (Jordan Novet/CNBC)

items.title_zh: 捷克一家人工智能初创公司表示，它可以通过声音检测无人机，每个传感器价格为 150 欧元，并且希望首先连接电网
items.title_bilingual: 捷克一家人工智能初创公司表示，它可以通过声音检测无人机，每个传感器价格为 150 欧元，并且希望首先连接电网 / A Czech AI startup says it can detect drones by sound for €150 per sensor, and it wants to wire up power grids first

items.title: Sources: the US has held off adding DeepSeek, CXMT, and 100+ other flagged companies to its Entity List, last updated in October, the longest gap in 10+ years (Karen Freifeld/Reuters)
items.title_original: Sources: the US has held off adding DeepSeek, CXMT, and 100+ other flagged companies to its Entity List, last updated in October, the longest gap in 10+ years (Karen Freifeld/Reuters)
items.title_en: Sources: the US has held off adding DeepSeek, CXMT, and 100+ other flagged companies to its Entity List, last updated in October, the longest gap in 10+ years (Karen Freifeld/Reuters)
items.title_zh: 资料来源：美国推迟将 DeepSeek、CXMT 和其他 100 多家标记公司添加到其实体名单中，最后一次更新是在 10 月份，这是 10 多年来最长的差距（Karen Freifeld/路透社）
items.title_bilingual: 资料来源：美国推迟将 DeepSeek、CXMT 和其他 100 多家标记公司添加到其实体名单中，最后一次更新是在 10 月份，这是 10 多年来最长的差距（Karen Freifeld/路透社） / Sources: the US has held off adding DeepSeek, CXMT, and 100+ other flagged companies to its Entity List, last updated in October, the longest gap in 10+ years (Karen Freifeld/Reuters)
